---
title: "#PredictiveFIFA (Final)"
author: "Andrés Gutiérrez"
date: "2014-07-13"
categories:
  - "Colombia"
  - "Estadística"
---

Today is the final match for the first place of the FIFA 2014 World Cup. The match is Argentina vs. Germany. The probabilities of the final results are shown in the following plot.

The most likely scores are shown in the following chart (probabilities in percentage are shown inside each cell):

**Make your bets!**

**Yours truly, **

**[Andrés Gutiérrez](../index.qmd) ([@psirusteam](https://twitter.com/psirusteam)) & [Alex Zambrano](http://experienceinstatistics.blogspot.com) ([@alexjzc](https://twitter.com/alexjzc)).**
